---
name: Feature request
description: Suggest a new feature or API improvement
labels: ['enhancement']
---

## Problem / use case

What problem does this solve? What workflow is awkward or missing today?

## Proposed API

Show the desired usage with a code snippet:

```ts
import { ImageCompression } from '@gkzlabs/image-compression';

// what you want to write
```

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why is the proposed API better?

## Backwards compatibility

- [ ] This is purely additive (no breaking change)
- [ ] Requires a major version bump
- [ ] Not sure — needs design discussion

## Additional context

Links to related issues, prior art from other libraries, or screenshots.
